steps.shortProse: Install the rdc CLI on your laptop with the one-liner from the install page.
Log in to your Rediacc subscription from the CLI so your license is recognized.

prose.en: Log in to your Rediacc subscription from the CLI so your license is recognized.
prose.de: Melden Sie sich über die CLI bei Ihrem Rediacc-Abonnement an, damit Ihre Lizenz erkannt wird.
prose.es: Inicia sesión en tu suscripción de Rediacc desde la CLI para que se reconozca tu licencia.
prose.fr: Connectez-vous à votre abonnement Rediacc depuis la CLI pour que votre licence soit reconnue.
prose.ja: CLI から Rediacc サブスクリプションにログインし、ライセンスが認識されるようにします。
prose.ar: سجّل الدخول إلى اشتراك Rediacc من CLI حتى يتم التعرّف على ترخيصك.
prose.ru: Войдите в свою подписку Rediacc через CLI, чтобы лицензия была распознана.
prose.tr: Lisansınızın tanınması için CLI'dan Rediacc aboneliğinize giriş yapın.
prose.zh: 从 CLI 登录到你的 Rediacc 订阅，以便识别你的许可证。
prose.et: Logi oma Rediacc tellimisse CLI kaudu, et litsents ära tuntaks.
prose.ko: CLI에서 Rediacc 구독에 로그인하여 라이선스가 인식되도록 합니다.
prose.pt: Inicie sessão na sua subscrição Rediacc a partir da CLI para que a sua licença seja reconhecida.
prose.it: Accedi al tuo abbonamento Rediacc dalla CLI in modo che la tua licenza venga riconosciuta.

steps.shortProse: Generate an Ed25519 SSH key on your laptop once; the same key works for every server.
Authorize the key on your first server with ssh-copy-id so future logins skip the password.
Register the server by giving it a local name, IP address, and SSH user.
Provision the server to install renet and create the encrypted datastore.
Create an encrypted repository on the server; it mounts automatically as an isolated environment.
Connect to the repository with --browser to open a full editor in your browser.
